relic.excesssigil.name: Sigil Of Excess
relic.excesssigil.description: All spell cards have +2 added to their effects, but all attacks have -2 power.
relic.excesssigil.flavor.1: An ancient sigil, one that amplifies everything it touches, even the simplest incantation.
relic.desperation.name: Desperation
relic.desperation.description: While below 75% of Max HP, all cards cost 1 less MP to play.
relic.desperation.flavor.1: When the heart races against time, every breath is a bargain with the inevitable.
relic.pactbrand.name: Pact Brand
relic.pactbrand.description: When you play an attack card, add +2 power to its attacks but take 2 fixed damage.
relic.pactbrand.flavor.1: A scar on your soul, offering power at the cost of your own vitality.
relic.powerring.name: Ring of Power
relic.powerring.description: At the start of the turn, gain X Attack Power Up and X Fragile. (X is the turn count (Max. 3))
relic.powerring.flavor.1: Time spirals into your favor, but each passing moment chips away at your resolve.
relic.loosepockets.name: Loose Pockets
relic.loosepockets.description: At the start of the turn, draw 2 extra cards, then discard 1 card randomly from your hand.
relic.loosepockets.flavor.1: Bountiful distractions in your hands, but only chaos remains when the cards fall.
relic.twilightband.name: Twilight Band
relic.twilightband.description:
Gain +1 Card Slot.
Max HP reduced by 15%, and you gain 1 Fragile at the start of every turn.
relic.twilightband.flavor.1: The band glows with the waning light of a forgotten promise, a weight both empowering and destructive.
relic.memorychain.name: Memory Chain
relic.memorychain.description:
Gain +2 Card Slots.
At the start of combat, lose 2 HP for each unfilled card slot.
relic.memorychain.flavor.1: The past is a chain around your wrist, pulling you toward both your potential and your downfall.
relic.lonevigil.name: Uneven Odds
relic.lonevigil.description: At the start of the turn, if enemies outnumber allies, gain 1 Attack Power Up per extra enemy; if allies outnumber enemies, a random ally gains 1 Fragile per extra ally.
relic.lonevigil.flavor.1: The fewer at his side, the stronger he stood. The more, the more brittle their hope became.
relic.echoofone.name: Echo of One
relic.echoofone.description: At the start of the turn, if you are the only alive ally, gain 3 Attack Power Up.
relic.echoofone.flavor.1: In silence, the lone echo grows louder, until all that's left is purpose.
relic.lastlight.name: Last Light
relic.lastlight.description: When an ally would die, instead restore them to half of max HP with 1 Fragile. Can only trigger once per battle.
relic.lastlight.flavor.1: Even the dimmest flame resists the dark… if only for a moment.
relic.recursiveheart.name: Recursive Heart
relic.recursiveheart.description: The first card any of your units play each turn is returned to their hand.
relic.recursiveheart.flavor.1: It beats again. And again. And again.
relic.fatesfavor.name: Fate's Favor
relic.fatesfavor.description: At the start of the turn, if you have no cards in hand, gain 2 Protection.
relic.fatesfavor.flavor.1: When fate smiles, it grants both power and protection.
relic.echoingshield.name: Echoing Shield
relic.echoingshield.description: At the start of the turn, gain 1 Protection for each card that was played last turn. (Max. 3)
relic.echoingshield.flavor.1: The echoes of your past actions shield you, but only if you remember to listen.
relic.overchannelorgan.name: Overchannel Organ
relic.overchannelorgan.description:
Gain +2 Max MP.
At the start of combat, take fixed damage equal to half the unspent MP.
relic.overchannelorgan.flavor.1: It feeds on restraint, punishing hesitation with internal collapse.
relic.bleedingstatue.name: Bleeding Statue
relic.bleedingstatue.description:
At the start of the turn, all units gain Bleed equal to the turn count. (Max. 5)
Allies with 5 or more Bleed gain 2 Attack Power Up. Allies who end the turn with 10+ Bleed take 5 fixed damage.
relic.bleedingstatue.flavor.1: A mysterious statue that reeks with a metallic stench of blood.
relic.maskofjoy.name: Mask Of Joy
relic.maskofjoy.description:
At the start of the turn, gain 1 Attack Power Up for every 5 damage taken last turn. (Max. 3)
If you took less than 5 damage, gain 1 Attack Power Down instead.
relic.maskofjoy.flavor.1: An ancient comedy mask. It laughs as you suffer.
relic.maskofsorrow.name: Mask Of Sorrow
relic.maskofsorrow.description:
At the start of the turn, gain 1 Protection for every 5 damage taken last turn. (Max. 3)
If you took less than 5 damage, gain 1 Fragile instead.
relic.maskofsorrow.flavor.1: An ancient tragedy mask. It weeps for your cowardice.
relic.masquerade.name: Masquerade
relic.masquerade.description:
At the start of the turn, halve all status ailments on self.
Gain either 2 Attack Power Up or 2 Protection randomly.
relic.masquerade.flavor.1: A grand performance where joy and sorrow dance in tandem.
